pr.title: refactor: UX improvements from design review — extract components, fix loading, declutter UI
pr.body:
## Summary

Implements the highest-priority fixes from a comprehensive UI/UX, product design, and architecture review of the Fourcast app. Key changes:

**Component extraction (maintenance)**
- `app/markets/page.js` reduced from **2,923 → 911 lines** by extracting `SportsTabContent`, `DiscoveryTabContent`, `MarketCard`, `ChainRecommendationBadge`, `ChainActionWidget`, and `LoadingAnalysisState` into `app/markets/components.js`
- Fixed a latent bug: `handlePublishSignal` was a closure reference that would've broken if the original file was ever split — now correctly uses `onPublishSignal` prop

**Remove weather-as-loading-gate**
- Agent, Positions, Labs, and Markets pages no longer show a full-screen spinner while weather data loads
- Pages render immediately using `Date.getHours()` for initial `isNight` theming; weather updates the theme asynchronously when it arrives

**Simplify Markets page above-the-fold**
- Removed `SynthShowcase` (marketing copy, not functional UI), `PortfolioCard`, and `UnifiedConnect` from the main Markets content area
- Users now see the MarketEdgeScanner and market list immediately without scrolling past promotional content

**Fix broken onboarding tour**
- Updated tour step targets from stale `[data-onboard="crypto"]` / `[data-onboard="sports"]` selectors to match current PageNav attributes: `markets`, `publish`, `agent`, `positions`

**Disable pricing overlay when unconfigured**
- `PricingOverlay` now returns `null` when `NEXT_PUBLIC_USDC_TOKEN` and `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUBSCRIPTION_CONTRACT` aren't set, preventing the broken "Payment not configured" state from showing

**Mobile nav labels**
- Added tiny text labels below emoji icons in mobile navigation (was icon-only, ambiguous)

**Naming consistency**
- Renamed "You" → "Positions" across PageNav, footer links, and the positions page header
- Fixed duplicate comment in `SearchLanding.js`
- Corrected model name in `ReasoningVisualizer`: DeepSeek-R1 → Llama 3.3

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] **Markets page rendering**: Navigate to `/markets` — verify markets load, analysis works, and the extracted SportsTab/DiscoveryTab render correctly. This is the highest-risk change (component extraction from a 2.9K line file)
- [ ] **Mobile nav**: Check on a mobile viewport that icons now show labels (Markets, Signals, Agent, Positions, Labs)
- [ ] **No more loading spinners**: Visit `/agent`, `/positions`, `/labs` — pages should render immediately instead of showing a spinner while weather loads
- [ ] **Pricing overlay**: Verify the pricing overlay does NOT appear when payment contracts aren't configured (try using 3+ free analyses)
- [ ] **Onboarding tour**: Reset localStorage key `fourcast_onboarding_complete` and verify the tour targets the correct nav items

**Recommended test plan**: Start on the landing page `/`, search for a market (e.g., "BTC $100k"), verify the analysis flow works end-to-end through Markets → analysis → publish signal. Check mobile responsiveness at 375px viewport width.

### Notes

- Build passes cleanly (`next build` completes without errors)
- Lint shows 0 errors, only pre-existing warnings (unused vars in positions/page.js, etc.)
- The `freeAnalysesUsed` state variable in markets/page.js is set but never read — left as-is since it may be needed for a future usage counter display
- `showArbitrage` state was moved from the parent page into `DiscoveryTabContent` as local state since it's only used there

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/16cd249492b146fba445d357f075405c
Requested by: @thisyearnofear
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
